subcodes.first_line: O thou herald of the Kingdom of God! Thy letter was received. A thousand times bravo to thy magnanimity and exalted aim!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی ملکوت الله نامه شما رسید هزار آفرین بر همت بلند و مقصد ارجمند تو
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of the Manifestation of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
